name: I am Kauã Hiro Mizumoto
description: My name is Kauã Hiro Mizumoto and I work with Systems Engineering.
my-description: Development focused on complex business rules, API integrations, and the implementation of Artificial Intelligence to elevate corporate operations.
design-info: Development and automated data synchronization, connecting internal flows directly to external ecosystems and marketplaces via REST APIs.
development-info: Creation of scalable software architectures using React, Next.js, and Python, focusing on stability and translating business rules into fluid interfaces.
marketing-info: Implementation of internal virtual assistants using Microsoft Copilot Studio and knowledge management architecture to optimize corporate support.
maintenance-info: Adaptation and development of SaaS platforms from scratch, structuring complex logic for specific market niches.
seo-info: Structuring relational databases and creating scripts for data crossing, reconciliation, and automated reporting (Power BI).
optimization-info: Engineering of corporate automations, from mass messaging via WhatsApp to monitoring and capturing Electronic Invoices.
about-info-1: I am a Software Developer with a strong focus on Backend, API integrations, and Artificial Intelligence. My main motivation is to use technology to solve business bottlenecks: I transform manual, expensive, and time-consuming processes into automated workflows that reduce operational costs (OPEX) and scale team productivity.
about-info-2: My technical foundation consolidates tools such as Python, SQL, JavaScript/React, and FastAPI. In the corporate day-to-day, I work on building end-to-end architectures. My recent deliverables include: • Development of Autonomous AI Agents (Copilots) to optimize logistics operations and democratize data access via natural language. • Systems integration via APIs with major retail marketplaces. • Implementation of Generative AI applied to E-commerce and Marketing flows.
about-info-3: I am passionate about productizing Artificial Intelligence. To support this vision, besides being a student of Multiplatform Software Development (Fatec), I hold strategic certifications in AWS Generative AI, Google Gemini, and Cloud Architecture. My focus is not on infrastructure, but rather on systems and product engineering: building clean code, robust APIs, and intelligent integrations that protect the company's revenue and give back time for decision-making.
about-skills-1: Python (FastAPI, Automations): Used for integration engineering and data reconciliation scripts.
about-skills-2: JavaScript / TypeScript: Essential for modern systems development and static typing in backend and frontend.
about-skills-3: React & Next.js: Core frameworks for creating SaaS platforms and dynamic dashboards.
about-skills-4: SQL Server & Relational Databases: Structuring, modeling, and manipulating corporate data.
about-skills-5: Microsoft Copilot Studio & RAG: Advanced implementation of virtual assistants based on Generative AI.
about-skills-6: REST API Integration: Synchronization of corporate ecosystems and marketplaces.
about-skills-7: Version Control (Git): Secure versioning and continuous collaboration in software development.
about-skills-8: Requirements Engineering: Ability to translate operational and business needs into programmable solutions.
about-skills-9: Logic & Algorithms: Absolute focus on building solid, efficient, and high-performance systemic foundations.
services-questions-p1: It is an application that adapts to any device, whether on mobile phones, tablets, or computers, without losing usability.
services-questions-p2: We build secure bridges (APIs) so that your system can communicate with other tools, automating previously manual processes.
services-questions-p3: Yes. Implementing intelligent agents reduces internal support time and automates the search for knowledge in corporate documents.
services-questions-p4: We analyze your company's business rules, design the database architecture, and develop the application with a total focus on scalability.
